_apply_summaries.summary: Attach provided summaries to matching node names in the tree.

_build_tree.summary: Constructs an internal tree of functions and relationships for analysis.

_build_tree.expand.summary: Expands a function node into its child relationships for display.

_collect_tree_names.summary: Collects all function names present in the tree.

_display_name.summary: Derives a readable name from a filesystem path.

_fallback_summary.summary: Provides a generic summary based on child calls.

_fingerprint.summary: Computes a hash fingerprint for code content.

_flatten_call_tree.summary: Flattens a hierarchical call tree into readable lines.

_load_summary_cache.summary: Loads cached function summaries to speed up analysis.

_mock_analysis.summary: Returns a mock analysis structure for development.

_save_summary_cache.summary: Saves updated summaries to a cache file.

analyze.summary: Validates the folder path, builds analysis, and optionally returns a function flow tree; raises HTTP errors on failure.

bind_assignment.summary: Binds assignment targets to inferred callables in a scope.

build_analysis.summary: Builds a functional analysis tree for a path.

build_flow_tree.summary: Creates a flow tree showing function call relationships.

build_flow_tree.expand.summary: Expands a flow-tree node to reveal deeper calls.

call_llm.summary: Calls a language model to generate text from a prompt.

collect_module_bindings.summary: Collects variable bindings from a Python AST into a scope.

get_qualified_name.summary: Returns a dot-separated qualified name from scope and name.

iter_python_files.summary: Iterates over Python files, excluding ignored directories.

iter_target_names.summary: Extracts target names from assignment targets.

module_name_for.summary: Infers module name from a file path relative to root.

summarize_flow.summary: Produces a concise explanation of execution flow using a language model.

summarize_functions.summary: Generates concise per-function summaries, using caching when possible.
